allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=nasun-prod aws logs tail /aws/lambda/nasun-follower-token-refresh --since 2h --format short --region ap-northeast-2)

Bash(AWS_PROFILE=nasun-prod aws cloudwatch describe-alarms --alarm-names "nasun-follower-invalid-refresh-token" --region ap-northeast-2 --query 'MetricAlarms[0].{State:StateValue,Reason:StateReason,Updated:StateUpdatedTimestamp}' --output json)

Bash(AWS_PROFILE=nasun-prod aws lambda invoke --function-name nasun-follower-token-refresh --payload 'eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJtYW51YWwudmVyaWZpY2F0aW9uIiwiZm9yY2VSZWZyZXNoIjpmYWxzZX0=' --region ap-northeast-2 /tmp/refresh-result.json)

Bash(AWS_PROFILE=nasun-prod aws cloudwatch set-alarm-state --alarm-name "nasun-follower-invalid-refresh-token" --state-value OK --state-reason "Manual re-auth completed, token verified" --region ap-northeast-2)
